name_cn:
Chanel 24B Bow🎀 Glitter CF
Size: 21(cm)
New 24B Bow🎀 Glitter bag is here.
It might be a best-seller among the many bow elements in the 24A series.
This season, a new glitter model with bow elements is released.
The development difficulty is high, and the placement matches the original exactly.
Black and white combination, full of sophistication.
